channel.title: dout.dev — css
channel.description: RSS feed for posts tagged with css

item.title: CSS Properties Hierarchy (Or: How I Learned Custom Properties Can Replace Preprocessors)
item.description: I've been writing CSS since before border-radius was a thing, back when we used -moz-border-radius and prayed everything to work well.

item.title: Modern CSS Is Enough (Container Queries, Nesting, `:has()` — No Framework Required)
Design Tokens Before Pages (Yes, I Wrote the CSS Before the First Line of HTML)
item.description: The mistake I kept making (repeat after me: tokens first)
